text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ready up, Urara! I'm about to tell you how to
make my special Shining Mud Dumplings!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Golshi... I came here because you promised with a
big, smug grin that you had "extremely valuable
data" to share. You'd better not tell me you were
referring to meaningless mud dumplings.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Par-don? What the flip else would I mean? I'm talkin' about how to create a national treasure here.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Mud balls aren't a national treasure! Tch... I'm
such an idiot to fall for your nonsense.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! No fighting! Bad! Be nice and get along
with each other!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's not a fight... Hm? Wait, there's something odd
about that pillar over there. Is there... a hole in it?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, the hole, yeah. I chucked a mud dumpling
and—pop!—put a hole right through it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Wha—?! Th-that's impossible! Just how dense are
these dumplings of yours?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Golshi. Tell me how they're formed. I'm
not leaving until you spit it out!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah, now I've piqued your curiosity, eh? That's the end of that, then. It's too late for you. You've finally fallen down the endless rabbit hole that is... mud dumplings.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, now we're getting along great! ♪
